Overrides.Override: 15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
40% of Damage taken from Critical Strikes Recouped as Life Limited to 1 Runegraft of Restitching

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Mageblood Heavy Belt Unique ID: 1a0cf800fd254494763b64b6f1756d52b9e2eb517524466baeba5d44c6fc4f32 Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 +42 to Strength +43 to Dexterity +22% to Fire Resistance +22% to Cold Resistance Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
